MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Douglas B. Provencher, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Gary Looney, President of Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Defendant Michael Ralph Adams, a/k/a Michael R. Adams, a/k/a Michael Adams, a/k/a Mike Adams as guarantor of Motherlode Inc. was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Mr. Adams also appeared on behalf of defendant Motherlode Inc., a Calfornia corporation, in his capacity as managing member.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was filed on July 9, 2009, which set trial for October 19, 2009. Parties stipulated to continue trial date to October 26, 2009, and to today, November 23, 2009.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Provencher. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, plaintiff shall have judgment against defendants in the amount of $11,259.79. Plaintiff shall take no action to enforce the judgment provided defendants pay plaintiff $2,000.00 on or before December 31, 2009. Thereafter, defendants shall pay plaintiff $750.00 per month, payable on the last day of each month. No interest shall accrue on the judgment. When paid in full, plaintiff will file a satisfaction of judgment.
If defendants fail to make a monthly payment, they (defendants) shall have ten days to cure the default, after proper notice has been sent to Michael Adams. If the default is not cured after the ten day period, plaintiff may enforce the judgment by any legal means available.

Mr. Adams was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of the agreement.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court for signature.

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MIKE ADAMS'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS.
APPEARANCES: ROBERT D. RESNER, ESQUIRE (415.482.9500) SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MIKE ADAMS, PRO PER (530.957.1938) APPEARING THROUGH COURTCALL ON HIS OWN BEHALF.
RULING: ARGUED AMD THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE EVIDENCE IS THAT PLAINTIFF LACKED ACTUAL NOTICE OF THE SUIT WHEN THE DEFAULT WAS TAKEN AND HAS SOUGHT RELIEF WITHIN THE TIME ALLOWED UNDER C.C.P SECTION 473.5. COURT VACATES ANY POST JUDGMENT ORDERS. COURT DIRECTS MR. ADAMS TO SERVE ANSWER AND APPLICABLE PLEADINGS ON THE PLAINTIFF. MR. ADAMS IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: SCOTT HUGHES, CSR 12365
